concepts.label: Geological Survey
concepts.definition: Scientific assessment of mineral deposits and rock formations

concepts.label: Ore Deposit
concepts.definition: Natural concentration of minerals in Earth's crust

concepts.label: Open-Pit Mining
concepts.definition: Surface mining technique extracting minerals from an open pit

concepts.label: Underground Mining
concepts.definition: Extraction of minerals from beneath Earth's surface via tunnels

concepts.label: Drilling
concepts.definition: Process of creating holes in rock to place explosives or extract samples

concepts.label: Blasting
concepts.definition: Use of explosives to fragment rock in mining operations

concepts.label: Ore Extraction
concepts.definition: Removal of mineral-bearing rock from the earth

concepts.label: Crushing
concepts.definition: Mechanical reduction of ore to smaller particle sizes

concepts.label: Grinding
concepts.definition: Fine reduction of crushed ore to liberate mineral particles

concepts.label: Flotation
concepts.definition: Mineral separation process using differences in surface hydrophobicity

concepts.label: Leaching
concepts.definition: Chemical extraction of metals from ore using solvents

concepts.label: Concentration
concepts.definition: Process of increasing the proportion of valuable mineral in ore

concepts.label: Smelting
concepts.definition: Extraction of metal from ore by heating beyond melting point

concepts.label: Blast Furnace
concepts.definition: Industrial furnace for smelting iron from ore using coke and limestone

concepts.label: Slag
concepts.definition: Waste material separated from metals during smelting

concepts.label: Refining
concepts.definition: Purification of crude metal to remove impurities

concepts.label: Electrolysis
concepts.definition: Use of electric current to drive non-spontaneous chemical reactions

concepts.label: Casting
concepts.definition: Pouring molten metal into a mold to create a specific shape

concepts.label: Rolling
concepts.definition: Metal forming process using rollers to reduce thickness

concepts.label: Forging
concepts.definition: Shaping metal using localized compressive forces

concepts.label: Heat Treatment
concepts.definition: Controlled heating and cooling to alter metal properties

concepts.label: Annealing
concepts.definition: Heat treatment to reduce hardness and increase ductility

concepts.label: Quenching
concepts.definition: Rapid cooling of metal to increase hardness

concepts.label: Tempering
concepts.definition: Reheating quenched metal to reduce brittleness

concepts.label: Alloy Production
concepts.definition: Combining metals to create materials with enhanced properties

concepts.label: Steel Production
concepts.definition: Manufacturing of steel from iron and carbon

concepts.label: Aluminum Production
concepts.definition: Manufacturing of aluminum via Bayer and Hall-Héroult processes

concepts.label: Copper Refining
concepts.definition: Purification of copper through electrolytic processes

concepts.label: Metal Sheet
concepts.definition: Flat piece of metal formed by rolling

concepts.label: Metal Wire
concepts.definition: Metal drawn into thin flexible strand

concepts.label: Welding
concepts.definition: Joining metals by melting and fusing them together

concepts.label: Machining
concepts.definition: Subtractive manufacturing using cutting tools

concepts.label: CNC Machining
concepts.definition: Computer-controlled precision cutting of materials

concepts.label: Assembly Line
concepts.definition: Manufacturing process where parts are added sequentially

concepts.label: Quality Control
concepts.definition: Inspection and testing to ensure product standards

concepts.label: Industrial Robot
concepts.definition: Programmable machine for automated manufacturing tasks

concepts.label: Finished Product
concepts.definition: Completed manufactured good ready for distribution

concepts.label: Tailings
concepts.definition: Waste materials left after ore processing

concepts.label: Mine Reclamation
concepts.definition: Restoration of mined land to natural or usable state

concepts.label: Bauxite
concepts.definition: Primary ore of aluminum, rich in aluminum hydroxide minerals

concepts.label: Iron Ore
concepts.definition: Rock containing iron minerals, primarily hematite and magnetite

concepts.label: Copper Ore
concepts.definition: Rock containing copper minerals like chalcopyrite

concepts.label: Coke
concepts.definition: Carbon-rich fuel produced by heating coal without air

concepts.label: Limestone
concepts.definition: Sedimentary rock used as flux in smelting to remove impurities

concepts.label: Photosynthesis
concepts.definition: Process by which plants convert light energy into chemical energy

concepts.label: Light Reactions
concepts.definition: Phase of photosynthesis capturing light energy in thylakoids

concepts.label: Calvin Cycle
concepts.definition: Light-independent reactions fixing CO2 into glucose

concepts.label: Chlorophyll
concepts.definition: Green pigment in plants that absorbs light for photosynthesis

concepts.label: Thylakoid
concepts.definition: Membrane-bound compartment inside chloroplasts

concepts.label: Photosystem II
concepts.definition: First protein complex in the light reactions

concepts.label: Photosystem I
concepts.definition: Second protein complex in light reactions producing NADPH

concepts.label: Electron Transport Chain
concepts.definition: Series of protein complexes transferring electrons to generate ATP

concepts.label: ATP Synthase
concepts.definition: Enzyme producing ATP from ADP using proton gradient

concepts.label: ATP
concepts.definition: Adenosine triphosphate, primary energy currency of cells

concepts.label: NADPH
concepts.definition: Electron carrier molecule used in Calvin Cycle

concepts.label: Carbon Fixation
concepts.definition: Incorporation of CO2 into organic molecules by RuBisCO

concepts.label: RuBisCO
concepts.definition: Enzyme catalyzing carbon fixation in photosynthesis

concepts.label: Glucose
concepts.definition: Simple sugar C6H12O6, primary product of photosynthesis

concepts.label: Oxygen
concepts.definition: Element O2 released as byproduct of photosynthesis

concepts.label: Carbon Dioxide
concepts.definition: Gas CO2 used as carbon source in photosynthesis

concepts.label: Water
concepts.definition: H2O molecule, reactant in photosynthesis and essential for life

concepts.label: Sunlight
concepts.definition: Electromagnetic radiation from the Sun, energy source for photosynthesis

concepts.label: Stroma
concepts.definition: Fluid-filled space inside chloroplast where Calvin Cycle occurs

concepts.label: Chloroplast
concepts.definition: Organelle in plant cells where photosynthesis occurs

concepts.label: Cellular Respiration
concepts.definition: Process of breaking down glucose to produce ATP

concepts.label: Glycolysis
concepts.definition: Breakdown of glucose into pyruvate in the cytoplasm

concepts.label: Pyruvate
concepts.definition: Three-carbon molecule produced by glycolysis

concepts.label: Krebs Cycle
concepts.definition: Citric acid cycle oxidizing acetyl-CoA in mitochondria

concepts.label: Acetyl-CoA
concepts.definition: Two-carbon molecule entering the Krebs Cycle

concepts.label: Mitochondria
concepts.definition: Organelle where cellular respiration produces ATP

concepts.label: Oxidative Phosphorylation
concepts.definition: ATP production via electron transport in mitochondria

concepts.label: NADH
concepts.definition: Electron carrier produced in glycolysis and Krebs Cycle

concepts.label: FADH2
concepts.definition: Electron carrier produced in Krebs Cycle

concepts.label: Fermentation
concepts.definition: Anaerobic pathway regenerating NAD+ without oxygen

concepts.label: Lactic Acid Fermentation
concepts.definition: Fermentation producing lactic acid in animal cells

concepts.label: Alcoholic Fermentation
concepts.definition: Fermentation producing ethanol and CO2 in yeast

concepts.label: Ingestion
concepts.definition: Taking food into the mouth

concepts.label: Mastication
concepts.definition: Mechanical breakdown of food by chewing

concepts.label: Saliva
concepts.definition: Fluid containing amylase secreted by salivary glands

concepts.label: Salivary Amylase
concepts.definition: Enzyme beginning starch digestion in the mouth

concepts.label: Bolus
concepts.definition: Ball of chewed food mixed with saliva

concepts.label: Swallowing
concepts.definition: Movement of bolus from mouth to esophagus via peristalsis

concepts.label: Esophagus
concepts.definition: Muscular tube connecting mouth to stomach

concepts.label: Peristalsis
concepts.definition: Wave-like muscle contractions moving food through digestive tract

concepts.label: Stomach
concepts.definition: Organ that chemically and mechanically digests food with acid

concepts.label: Gastric Acid
concepts.definition: Hydrochloric acid in stomach breaking down food, pH ~2

concepts.label: Pepsin
concepts.definition: Stomach enzyme breaking down proteins into peptides

concepts.label: Chyme
concepts.definition: Partially digested food mixture leaving the stomach

concepts.label: Small Intestine
concepts.definition: Primary site of nutrient absorption, ~6 meters long

concepts.label: Duodenum
concepts.definition: First section of small intestine receiving chyme and bile

concepts.label: Jejunum
concepts.definition: Middle section of small intestine, primary absorption site

concepts.label: Ileum
concepts.definition: Final section of small intestine absorbing B12 and bile salts

concepts.label: Bile
concepts.definition: Liver-produced fluid emulsifying fats in duodenum

concepts.label: Liver
concepts.definition: Organ producing bile and metabolizing nutrients

concepts.label: Gallbladder
concepts.definition: Organ storing and concentrating bile

concepts.label: Pancreas
concepts.definition: Organ producing digestive enzymes and insulin

concepts.label: Pancreatic Lipase
concepts.definition: Enzyme breaking down fats into fatty acids and glycerol

concepts.label: Trypsin
concepts.definition: Pancreatic enzyme breaking proteins into amino acids

concepts.label: Villi
concepts.definition: Finger-like projections in small intestine increasing surface area

concepts.label: Nutrient Absorption
concepts.definition: Transport of digested nutrients across intestinal wall

concepts.label: Amino Acids
concepts.definition: Building blocks of proteins absorbed in small intestine

concepts.label: Fatty Acids
concepts.definition: Products of fat digestion absorbed via lacteals

concepts.label: Monosaccharides
concepts.definition: Simple sugars absorbed in small intestine

concepts.label: Large Intestine
concepts.definition: Organ absorbing water and forming feces

concepts.label: Colon
concepts.definition: Main part of large intestine, absorbs water and electrolytes

concepts.label: Gut Microbiome
concepts.definition: Community of microorganisms in the digestive tract

concepts.label: Feces
concepts.definition: Waste material expelled from the body after digestion

concepts.label: Defecation
concepts.definition: Elimination of feces from the body

concepts.label: Cell Cycle
concepts.definition: Ordered series of events leading to cell division

concepts.label: Interphase
concepts.definition: Cell growth and DNA replication phase before mitosis

concepts.label: G1 Phase
concepts.definition: First gap phase of cell growth

concepts.label: S Phase
concepts.definition: DNA synthesis phase where chromosomes are replicated

concepts.label: G2 Phase
concepts.definition: Second gap phase preparing for mitosis

concepts.label: Mitosis
concepts.definition: Nuclear division producing two identical daughter cells

concepts.label: Prophase
concepts.definition: First stage of mitosis where chromosomes condense

concepts.label: Metaphase
concepts.definition: Mitotic stage where chromosomes align at cell equator

concepts.label: Anaphase
concepts.definition: Mitotic stage where sister chromatids separate

concepts.label: Telophase
concepts.definition: Final mitotic stage where nuclear envelopes reform

concepts.label: Cytokinesis
concepts.definition: Division of cytoplasm forming two daughter cells

concepts.label: Meiosis
concepts.definition: Cell division producing four haploid gametes

concepts.label: Meiosis I
concepts.definition: First meiotic division separating homologous chromosomes

concepts.label: Meiosis II
concepts.definition: Second meiotic division separating sister chromatids

concepts.label: Crossing Over
concepts.definition: Exchange of genetic material between homologous chromosomes

concepts.label: DNA Replication
concepts.definition: Process of copying DNA before cell division

concepts.label: DNA Polymerase
concepts.definition: Enzyme synthesizing new DNA strands

concepts.label: Helicase
concepts.definition: Enzyme unwinding DNA double helix during replication

concepts.label: Chromosome
concepts.definition: Structure of coiled DNA and proteins carrying genetic information

concepts.label: Centromere
concepts.definition: Region of chromosome where sister chromatids are joined

concepts.label: Spindle Fibers
concepts.definition: Microtubules pulling chromosomes apart during cell division

concepts.label: Centriole
concepts.definition: Organelle organizing spindle fibers during cell division

concepts.label: Apoptosis
concepts.definition: Programmed cell death eliminating damaged or unneeded cells

concepts.label: Tumor Suppressor Gene
concepts.definition: Gene preventing uncontrolled cell division

concepts.label: Oncogene
concepts.definition: Mutated gene promoting uncontrolled cell growth

concepts.label: Cancer
concepts.definition: Disease of uncontrolled cell division caused by genetic mutations

concepts.label: DNA
concepts.definition: Deoxyribonucleic acid storing genetic information

concepts.label: RNA
concepts.definition: Ribonucleic acid involved in protein synthesis

concepts.label: mRNA
concepts.definition: Messenger RNA carrying genetic code from DNA to ribosome

concepts.label: tRNA
concepts.definition: Transfer RNA delivering amino acids to ribosome

concepts.label: Ribosome
concepts.definition: Cellular structure assembling proteins from amino acids

concepts.label: Transcription
concepts.definition: Process of copying DNA into mRNA

concepts.label: Translation
concepts.definition: Process of assembling proteins from mRNA code at ribosome

concepts.label: RNA Polymerase
concepts.definition: Enzyme catalyzing transcription of DNA to RNA

concepts.label: Codon
concepts.definition: Three-nucleotide sequence coding for an amino acid

concepts.label: Protein
concepts.definition: Large molecule made of amino acid chains performing cell functions

concepts.label: Protein Folding
concepts.definition: Process by which a protein assumes its functional 3D structure

concepts.label: Enzyme
concepts.definition: Protein catalyst speeding up biochemical reactions

concepts.label: Raw Material Extraction
concepts.definition: Obtaining natural resources from the environment

concepts.label: Primary Sector
concepts.definition: Economic sector extracting raw materials from nature

concepts.label: Secondary Sector
concepts.definition: Economic sector transforming raw materials into goods

concepts.label: Tertiary Sector
concepts.definition: Economic sector providing services

concepts.label: Supply Chain
concepts.definition: Network of organizations involved in producing and delivering a product

concepts.label: Procurement
concepts.definition: Process of obtaining goods and services from suppliers

concepts.label: Raw Material Processing
concepts.definition: Initial transformation of raw materials into usable forms

concepts.label: Factory
concepts.definition: Industrial facility where goods are manufactured

concepts.label: Mass Production
concepts.definition: Manufacturing of large quantities of standardized products

concepts.label: Lean Manufacturing
concepts.definition: Production methodology minimizing waste

concepts.label: Just-In-Time Manufacturing
concepts.definition: Production strategy receiving materials only as needed

concepts.label: Inventory Management
concepts.definition: Overseeing and controlling stock levels

concepts.label: Warehousing
concepts.definition: Storage of goods before distribution

concepts.label: Logistics
concepts.definition: Planning and execution of efficient transport and storage

concepts.label: Freight Transport
concepts.definition: Movement of goods via truck, rail, ship, or air

concepts.label: Shipping Container
concepts.definition: Standardized metal box for intermodal freight transport

concepts.label: Port
concepts.definition: Facility for loading and unloading ships

concepts.label: Distribution Center
concepts.definition: Facility for receiving, sorting, and shipping products

concepts.label: Wholesale
concepts.definition: Sale of goods in bulk to retailers or businesses

concepts.label: Retail
concepts.definition: Sale of goods directly to consumers

concepts.label: E-Commerce
concepts.definition: Buying and selling goods over the internet

concepts.label: Consumer
concepts.definition: Individual who purchases and uses goods and services

concepts.label: Market Demand
concepts.definition: Total quantity of a good consumers are willing to buy

concepts.label: Pricing
concepts.definition: Process of determining the monetary value of a product

concepts.label: Marketing
concepts.definition: Activities promoting and selling products or services

concepts.label: Branding
concepts.definition: Creating a distinctive identity for a product or company

concepts.label: Profit Margin
concepts.definition: Percentage of revenue remaining after costs

concepts.label: Revenue
concepts.definition: Total income generated from sales

concepts.label: Cost of Goods Sold
concepts.definition: Direct costs of producing goods sold by a company

concepts.label: Labor
concepts.definition: Human work contributing to production of goods and services

concepts.label: Capital
concepts.definition: Financial resources and assets used in production

concepts.label: Investment
concepts.definition: Allocation of capital to generate future returns

concepts.label: Return on Investment
concepts.definition: Measure of profitability relative to investment cost

concepts.label: Economies of Scale
concepts.definition: Cost advantages from increased production volume

concepts.label: Division of Labor
concepts.definition: Specialization of tasks to increase efficiency

concepts.label: Comparative Advantage
concepts.definition: Ability to produce goods at lower opportunity cost

concepts.label: Trade
concepts.definition: Exchange of goods and services between parties

concepts.label: International Trade
concepts.definition: Exchange of goods and services across national borders

concepts.label: Tariff
concepts.definition: Tax imposed on imported goods

concepts.label: Free Trade Agreement
concepts.definition: Treaty eliminating trade barriers between countries

concepts.label: GDP
concepts.definition: Gross Domestic Product, total value of goods produced in a country

concepts.label: Inflation
concepts.definition: General increase in prices and fall in purchasing value of money

concepts.label: Interest Rate
concepts.definition: Cost of borrowing money, set by central banks

concepts.label: Central Bank
concepts.definition: Institution managing a nation's currency and monetary policy

concepts.label: Currency
concepts.definition: System of money in general use in a particular country

concepts.label: Stock Market
concepts.definition: Marketplace for buying and selling company shares

concepts.label: Bond
concepts.definition: Debt instrument where investor loans money to an entity

concepts.label: Taxation
concepts.definition: Government levying charges on citizens and businesses

concepts.label: Government Spending
concepts.definition: Expenditure by government on public services and infrastructure

concepts.label: Fiscal Policy
concepts.definition: Government use of taxation and spending to influence economy

concepts.label: Monetary Policy
concepts.definition: Central bank actions controlling money supply and interest rates

concepts.label: Recession
concepts.definition: Significant decline in economic activity for sustained period

concepts.label: Unemployment
concepts.definition: State of being without a job while actively seeking work

concepts.label: Automation
concepts.definition: Use of technology to perform tasks without human intervention

concepts.label: Globalization
concepts.definition: Increasing interconnection of world economies and cultures

concepts.label: Outsourcing
concepts.definition: Contracting business processes to external providers

concepts.label: Fossil Fuel Combustion
concepts.definition: Burning coal, oil, and gas releasing CO2 and pollutants

concepts.label: Coal
concepts.definition: Combustible sedimentary rock used as fossil fuel

concepts.label: Petroleum
concepts.definition: Liquid fossil fuel extracted from underground reservoirs

concepts.label: Natural Gas
concepts.definition: Gaseous fossil fuel primarily composed of methane

concepts.label: Greenhouse Gas Emissions
concepts.definition: Release of gases that trap heat in Earth's atmosphere

concepts.label: Methane
concepts.definition: Potent greenhouse gas CH4 from agriculture and fossil fuels

concepts.label: Nitrous Oxide
concepts.definition: Greenhouse gas N2O from agriculture and combustion

concepts.label: Greenhouse Effect
concepts.definition: Trapping of heat by atmospheric gases warming Earth

concepts.label: Global Warming
concepts.definition: Long-term increase in Earth's average surface temperature

concepts.label: Climate Change
concepts.definition: Significant long-term changes in global climate patterns

concepts.label: Arctic Ice Melt
concepts.definition: Reduction of polar ice due to rising temperatures

concepts.label: Antarctic Ice Sheet
concepts.definition: Massive ice body covering Antarctica, losing mass

concepts.label: Glacier Retreat
concepts.definition: Shrinking of glaciers worldwide due to warming

concepts.label: Permafrost Thaw
concepts.definition: Melting of permanently frozen ground releasing methane

concepts.label: Sea Level Rise
concepts.definition: Increase in ocean levels from ice melt and thermal expansion

concepts.label: Thermal Expansion
concepts.definition: Expansion of water volume as ocean temperatures increase

concepts.label: Ocean Acidification
concepts.definition: Decrease in ocean pH from absorbing excess CO2

concepts.label: Coral Bleaching
concepts.definition: Loss of symbiotic algae in coral due to heat stress

concepts.label: Coral Reef
concepts.definition: Underwater ecosystem built by coral organisms

concepts.label: Biodiversity Loss
concepts.definition: Decline in variety of life forms in an ecosystem

concepts.label: Deforestation
concepts.definition: Clearing of forests for agriculture or development

concepts.label: Habitat Destruction
concepts.definition: Elimination of natural environments needed by species

concepts.label: Species Extinction
concepts.definition: Complete disappearance of a species from Earth

concepts.label: Desertification
concepts.definition: Degradation of land in arid areas into desert

concepts.label: Soil Erosion
concepts.definition: Removal of topsoil by wind, water, or human activity

concepts.label: Water Pollution
concepts.definition: Contamination of water bodies with harmful substances

concepts.label: Air Pollution
concepts.definition: Presence of harmful substances in the atmosphere

concepts.label: Particulate Matter
concepts.definition: Tiny particles in air from combustion and industry

concepts.label: Smog
concepts.definition: Air pollution from vehicle and industrial emissions

concepts.label: Acid Rain
concepts.definition: Precipitation with elevated acid levels from SO2 and NOx

concepts.label: Ozone Layer Depletion
concepts.definition: Thinning of stratospheric ozone by CFCs

concepts.label: CFC
concepts.definition: Chlorofluorocarbon, synthetic chemical destroying ozone

concepts.label: UV Radiation
concepts.definition: Ultraviolet radiation from the Sun, filtered by ozone

concepts.label: Eutrophication
concepts.definition: Excessive nutrient enrichment causing algal blooms

concepts.label: Algal Bloom
concepts.definition: Rapid growth of algae depleting oxygen in water

concepts.label: Dead Zone
concepts.definition: Aquatic area with insufficient oxygen to support life

concepts.label: Extreme Weather Events
concepts.definition: Hurricanes, droughts, floods intensified by climate change

concepts.label: Drought
concepts.definition: Extended period of abnormally low rainfall

concepts.label: Flooding
concepts.definition: Overflow of water onto normally dry land

concepts.label: Hurricane
concepts.definition: Tropical cyclone with sustained winds over 74 mph

concepts.label: Heat Wave
concepts.definition: Prolonged period of abnormally high temperatures

concepts.label: Wildfire
concepts.definition: Uncontrolled fire in vegetation, intensified by drought

concepts.label: Food Insecurity
concepts.definition: Lack of reliable access to sufficient nutritious food

concepts.label: Climate Migration
concepts.definition: Movement of people due to climate-related changes

concepts.label: Carbon Cycle
concepts.definition: Biogeochemical cycle of carbon through Earth's systems

concepts.label: Carbon Sink
concepts.definition: Natural reservoir absorbing more carbon than it releases

concepts.label: Carbon Source
concepts.definition: System releasing more carbon than it absorbs

concepts.label: Reforestation
concepts.definition: Planting trees to restore forested areas

concepts.label: Renewable Energy
concepts.definition: Energy from naturally replenishing sources

concepts.label: Solar Energy
concepts.definition: Energy harnessed from sunlight

concepts.label: Wind Energy
concepts.definition: Energy generated from wind using turbines

concepts.label: Hydroelectric Power
concepts.definition: Electricity generated from flowing water

concepts.label: Carbon Capture
concepts.definition: Technology removing CO2 from atmosphere or emissions

concepts.label: Paris Agreement
concepts.definition: International treaty to limit global warming to 1.5-2°C

concepts.label: Emission Trading
concepts.definition: Market-based system for controlling pollution by quotas

concepts.label: Plastic Pollution
concepts.definition: Accumulation of plastic products in the environment

concepts.label: Microplastics
concepts.definition: Tiny plastic particles contaminating ecosystems

concepts.label: Ocean Garbage Patch
concepts.definition: Accumulation of plastic debris in ocean gyres

concepts.label: E-Waste
concepts.definition: Discarded electronic equipment containing toxic materials

concepts.label: Recycling
concepts.definition: Processing waste materials into new products

concepts.label: Circular Economy
concepts.definition: Economic model minimizing waste through reuse and recycling

concepts.label: Silicon
concepts.definition: Chemical element Si, semiconductor basis of electronics

concepts.label: Sand
concepts.definition: Granular material containing silicon dioxide, source of silicon

concepts.label: Silicon Wafer
concepts.definition: Thin slice of crystalline silicon for chip fabrication

concepts.label: Semiconductor
concepts.definition: Material with conductivity between conductor and insulator

concepts.label: Doping
concepts.definition: Adding impurities to semiconductor to modify electrical properties

concepts.label: Photolithography
concepts.definition: Using light to pattern circuits on silicon wafers

concepts.label: Etching
concepts.definition: Removing material from wafer surface to create circuit patterns

concepts.label: Clean Room
concepts.definition: Controlled environment with minimal airborne particles for chip fabrication

concepts.label: Transistor
concepts.definition: Semiconductor device switching or amplifying electronic signals

concepts.label: Integrated Circuit
concepts.definition: Set of electronic circuits on a small chip of semiconductor

concepts.label: Microprocessor
concepts.definition: Integrated circuit containing a computer's CPU

concepts.label: CPU
concepts.definition: Central Processing Unit executing computer instructions

concepts.label: GPU
concepts.definition: Graphics Processing Unit for parallel computation

concepts.label: Memory Chip
concepts.definition: Integrated circuit storing digital data (RAM, ROM)

concepts.label: RAM
concepts.definition: Random Access Memory providing temporary fast storage

concepts.label: Flash Memory
concepts.definition: Non-volatile storage retaining data without power

concepts.label: SSD
concepts.definition: Solid State Drive using flash memory for data storage

concepts.label: Hard Drive
concepts.definition: Magnetic storage device for persistent data

concepts.label: Motherboard
concepts.definition: Main circuit board connecting all computer components

concepts.label: PCB
concepts.definition: Printed Circuit Board mechanically supporting electronic components

concepts.label: Power Supply
concepts.definition: Device converting AC power to DC for computer components

concepts.label: Computer
concepts.definition: Electronic device processing data according to instructions

concepts.label: Operating System
concepts.definition: Software managing hardware and providing services to programs

concepts.label: Linux
concepts.definition: Open-source operating system kernel

concepts.label: Windows
concepts.definition: Microsoft's proprietary operating system

concepts.label: Software
concepts.definition: Programs and instructions executed by a computer

concepts.label: Programming Language
concepts.definition: Formal language for writing computer instructions

concepts.label: Compiler
concepts.definition: Program translating source code into machine code

concepts.label: Algorithm
concepts.definition: Step-by-step procedure for solving a problem

concepts.label: Data Structure
concepts.definition: Organized format for storing and accessing data

concepts.label: Database
concepts.definition: Organized collection of structured data

concepts.label: SQL
concepts.definition: Structured Query Language for managing relational databases

concepts.label: Server
concepts.definition: Computer providing services to other computers on a network

concepts.label: Data Center
concepts.definition: Facility housing servers and network infrastructure

concepts.label: Cloud Computing
concepts.definition: Delivery of computing services over the internet

concepts.label: Virtualization
concepts.definition: Creating virtual versions of hardware or software resources

concepts.label: Network
concepts.definition: Interconnected system of computers sharing resources

concepts.label: LAN
concepts.definition: Local Area Network connecting devices in a limited area

concepts.label: Router
concepts.definition: Device forwarding data packets between computer networks

concepts.label: Switch
concepts.definition: Network device connecting devices within a LAN

concepts.label: Ethernet
concepts.definition: Wired networking technology for local area networks

concepts.label: TCP/IP
concepts.definition: Protocol suite governing internet communication

concepts.label: Internet
concepts.definition: Global network of interconnected computer networks

concepts.label: World Wide Web
concepts.definition: Information system of interlinked hypertext documents on the internet

concepts.label: HTTP
concepts.definition: Protocol for transferring hypertext documents on the web

concepts.label: DNS
concepts.definition: Domain Name System translating domain names to IP addresses

concepts.label: IP Address
concepts.definition: Numerical label identifying a device on a network

concepts.label: Fiber Optic Cable
concepts.definition: Cable using light pulses for high-speed data transmission

concepts.label: Wi-Fi
concepts.definition: Wireless networking technology using radio waves

concepts.label: 5G
concepts.definition: Fifth generation cellular network technology

concepts.label: Bandwidth
concepts.definition: Maximum data transfer rate of a network connection

concepts.label: Latency
concepts.definition: Time delay in data transmission across a network

concepts.label: Encryption
concepts.definition: Process of encoding data to prevent unauthorized access

concepts.label: Cybersecurity
concepts.definition: Practice of protecting systems and data from digital attacks

concepts.label: Firewall
concepts.definition: Network security system monitoring and filtering traffic

concepts.label: API
concepts.definition: Application Programming Interface enabling software interaction

concepts.label: Web Application
concepts.definition: Software application accessed through a web browser

concepts.label: Mobile App
concepts.definition: Software application designed for mobile devices

concepts.label: Smartphone
concepts.definition: Mobile device combining phone with computing capabilities

concepts.label: IoT
concepts.definition: Internet of Things, network of connected physical devices

concepts.label: Sensor
concepts.definition: Device detecting physical properties and converting to signals

concepts.label: Embedded System
concepts.definition: Computer system with dedicated function within larger system

concepts.label: FPGA

concepts.definition: Neural network specialized for image processing

concepts.label: Recurrent Neural Network
concepts.definition: Neural network processing sequential data

concepts.label: Attention Mechanism
concepts.definition: Neural network component focusing on relevant input parts

concepts.label: Word Embedding
concepts.definition: Dense vector representation of words

concepts.label: Tokenization
concepts.definition: Splitting text into tokens for NLP processing

concepts.label: Fine-Tuning
concepts.definition: Adapting a pre-trained model to specific tasks

concepts.label: Transfer Learning
concepts.definition: Applying knowledge from one task to a different task

concepts.label: Federated Learning
concepts.definition: Training ML models across decentralized devices

concepts.label: Computer Cluster
concepts.definition: Group of linked computers working as a single system

concepts.label: Parallel Computing
concepts.definition: Simultaneous execution of computations

concepts.label: Supercomputer
concepts.definition: Extremely powerful computer for complex calculations

concepts.label: Carbon Tax
concepts.definition: Tax on fossil fuel carbon content to reduce emissions

concepts.label: Carbon Footprint
concepts.definition: Total greenhouse gas emissions from an entity

concepts.label: Sustainability
concepts.definition: Meeting present needs without compromising future generations

concepts.label: Green Building
concepts.definition: Construction minimizing environmental impact

concepts.label: Net Zero
concepts.definition: Balancing greenhouse gas emissions with removal

concepts.label: Biofuel
concepts.definition: Fuel derived from biological materials

concepts.label: Ethanol
concepts.definition: Alcohol fuel produced from fermentation of crops

concepts.label: Hydrogen Economy
concepts.definition: Economic system using hydrogen as energy carrier

concepts.label: Nuclear Waste
concepts.definition: Radioactive byproducts of nuclear power generation

concepts.label: Biodegradable
concepts.definition: Material capable of being decomposed by biological organisms

concepts.label: Landfill
concepts.definition: Site for disposal of waste by burial

concepts.label: Incineration
concepts.definition: Burning of waste at high temperatures

concepts.label: Hazardous Waste
concepts.definition: Waste posing substantial danger to health or environment

concepts.label: Environmental Impact Assessment
concepts.definition: Evaluation of environmental effects of a project

concepts.label: ESG
concepts.definition: Environmental, Social, and Governance criteria for investments

concepts.label: Nutrition
concepts.definition: Process of obtaining food for health and growth

concepts.label: Vitamin
concepts.definition: Organic compound essential in small amounts for health

concepts.label: Mineral Nutrient
concepts.definition: Inorganic element required for body functions

concepts.label: Obesity
concepts.definition: Medical condition of excessive body fat

concepts.label: Cardiovascular Disease
concepts.definition: Disease of the heart or blood vessels

concepts.label: Stroke
concepts.definition: Interruption of blood supply to the brain

concepts.label: Alzheimer's Disease
concepts.definition: Progressive neurodegenerative disease causing dementia

concepts.label: Depression
concepts.definition: Mental health disorder with persistent low mood

concepts.label: Respiratory Disease
concepts.definition: Disease affecting the lungs and breathing

concepts.label: Asthma
concepts.definition: Chronic condition causing airway inflammation and narrowing

concepts.label: Malaria
concepts.definition: Parasitic disease transmitted by mosquitoes

concepts.label: HIV/AIDS
concepts.definition: Viral infection attacking the immune system

concepts.label: Tuberculosis
concepts.definition: Bacterial infection primarily affecting the lungs

concepts.label: Prosthetic
concepts.definition: Artificial device replacing a missing body part

concepts.label: Wearable Technology
concepts.definition: Electronic devices worn on the body for health monitoring

concepts.label: Insurance
concepts.definition: Financial protection against losses

concepts.label: Mortgage
concepts.definition: Loan for purchasing real estate

concepts.label: Credit
concepts.definition: Ability to borrow money with promise of future repayment

concepts.label: Debt
concepts.definition: Money owed by one party to another

concepts.label: Bankruptcy
concepts.definition: Legal status of inability to repay debts

concepts.label: Hedge Fund
concepts.definition: Investment fund using advanced strategies for high returns

concepts.label: Derivative
concepts.definition: Financial instrument deriving value from an underlying asset

concepts.label: Commodity
concepts.definition: Basic good used in commerce, interchangeable with others

concepts.label: Supply and Demand
concepts.definition: Economic model determining price through supply and demand balance

concepts.label: Monopoly
concepts.definition: Market structure where one firm dominates

concepts.label: Oligopoly
concepts.definition: Market dominated by a few large firms

concepts.label: Subsidy
concepts.definition: Government financial support to economic sectors

concepts.label: Precision Agriculture
concepts.definition: Technology-driven farming for optimization

concepts.label: Vertical Farming
concepts.definition: Growing crops in vertically stacked layers indoors

concepts.label: Hydroponics
concepts.definition: Growing plants without soil using mineral nutrient solutions

concepts.label: Permaculture
concepts.definition: Agricultural design mimicking natural ecosystems

concepts.label: Pollination
concepts.definition: Transfer of pollen enabling plant reproduction

concepts.label: Bee Colony
concepts.definition: Social group of bees essential for pollination

concepts.label: Topsoil
concepts.definition: Upper layer of soil richest in organic matter

concepts.label: Nitrogen Fixation
concepts.definition: Conversion of atmospheric nitrogen to usable forms

concepts.label: Crop Rotation
concepts.definition: Alternating crop types to maintain soil fertility

concepts.label: Privacy
concepts.definition: Right to control personal information

concepts.label: Data Privacy
concepts.definition: Protection of personal data from unauthorized access

concepts.label: GDPR
concepts.definition: EU General Data Protection Regulation

concepts.label: Algorithmic Bias
concepts.definition: Systematic error in AI producing unfair outcomes

concepts.label: Digital Divide
concepts.definition: Gap between those with and without technology access

concepts.label: Fake News
concepts.definition: Deliberately false information presented as news

concepts.label: Content Moderation
concepts.definition: Screening user-generated content for policy violations

concepts.label: Autonomous Weapon
concepts.definition: Weapon system selecting targets without human control

concepts.label: Surveillance
concepts.definition: Monitoring of behavior or activities

concepts.label: Facial Recognition
concepts.definition: Technology identifying persons from facial features
